extract: The Rolling Fields (Japanese: うららか草原 Splendid Grassland) are a part of the Wild Area in the Galar region, located in the south of the southern portion of the Wild Area. It connects to Meetup Spot to its south, Dappled Grove to its west, West Lake Axewell to its northwest, East Lake Axewell to its north, and South Lake Miloch to its northeast.
